title: MPEG_gaussian_splatting_transport.stitching
description: Parameters to attach Gaussian splats to a 3D triangular mesh primitive.

mesh.description: Index of the mesh in the glTF meshes array to which the Gaussian splats are stitched.

primitive.description: Index of the mesh primitive to which the Gaussian splats are stitched.

vertices.description: Accessor index containing vertex indices defining splat locations on mesh vertices. Mutually exclusive with faces and weights.

faces.description: Accessor index containing face indices defining splat locations on triangular faces. Mutually exclusive with vertices.

weights.description: Accessor index containing barycentric weight triplets (VEC3). Required when faces is present.

distances.description: Accessor index containing scalar distance values along the vertex or face normal.

displacement.description: Accessor index containing 3D displacement vectors (VEC3) from the mesh surface.
